articles.title: Dame Penelope Keith gets remembered for iconic TV roles
articles.description: Beloved British actress Dame Penelope Keith, famed for her roles in 'The Good Life' and 'To the Manor Born', has passed away at 86. Her family confirmed her peaceful death at home after living with cancer. Broadcaster Gyles Brandreth celebrated her remarkable career, noting her ability to create iconic characters while emphasizing her versatility beyond comedy, highlighting her significant contributions to both television and theatre.

articles.title: Keanu Reeves' Letter Saves Carl Rinsch From Longer Prison Sentence In $11 Million Netflix Fraud Case
articles.description: Director Carl Rinsch received a reduced prison sentence of 30 months for defrauding Netflix of $11 million during his unfinished sci-fi series, White Horse. Key to this outcome was a letter of Keanu Reeves, which highlighted Rinsch's mental health struggles.

articles.title: Kylie Jenner faces lawsuit as former chef says extreme workload led to her miscarriage
articles.description: Reality TV star and entrepreneur Kylie Jenner has been named in a new workplace lawsuit filed by a former private chef who claims she suffered a miscarriage because of demanding working conditions during her high-risk pregnancy.

articles.title: This Queen Made Bentleys The Ultimate Fashion Statement
articles.description: Decades before celebrities flaunted luxury cars on social media, Maharani Gayatri Devi of Jaipur was turning heads in elegant Bentleys that perfectly matched her style.

articles.title: Lock Upp 2: Akanksha Chamola Explains Real Reason Behind Split From Gaurav Khanna
articles.description: Lock Upp 2: Akanksha Chamola has spoken candidly about her separation from Gaurav Khanna on Lock Upp 2. The actress revealed that their differing views on having children gradually created distance, ultimately leading to their decision to part ways

articles.title: Psychology says parents who do these 7 things often teach children to hide their feelings
articles.description: A dismissed tear, a rushed correction, a sarcastic comment or a parent’s own discomfort with emotion can slowly teach a child that honesty has a cost. What follows is not usually dramatic. It is subtle, repetitive and easy to miss. But over time, these habits can shape how a child learns to handle sadness, fear, anger and shame. Here are seven common ways parents unintentionally teach children to hide what they feel.

articles.title: HR said every late minute means 10 minutes extra work. Gen Z employee found a loophole
articles.description: A new office policy designed to curb lateness backfired spectacularly when a Gen Z employee cleverly used its own logic to justify leaving work hours early. The rule, which mandated 10 extra minutes for every minute late, was turned on its head. The employee, after being penalized for arriving late, later argued that arriving early earned him significant compensatory time off, sparking a debate on policy design and employee interpretation.

articles.title: Trainer praises actor Suriya’s fitness commitment: ‘Champion’s mindset’
articles.description: The biggest takeaway from Suriya's workout is that fitness should not be limited to lifting heavier weights or spending hours on cardio, shared consultant dietitian and fitness expert Garima Goyal

articles.title: Eau de Parfum vs Eau de Toilette: Know which type of fragrance is right for you before your next purchase
articles.description: If you're confused between buying an Eau de Parfum or Eau de Toilette, then here is what you need to know.

articles.title: Internet slams Dia Mirza after 5-year-old son 'schools' delivery boy over plastic bags: ‘The entitlement is unreal’
articles.description: After narrating her son's scolding of a delivery boy for using plastic bags, Dia Mirza received significant criticism on social media.

articles.title: Madhavan could not believe his eyes after watching a 3-year-old drummer leading an orchestra
articles.description: A three-year-old Russian drumming prodigy, Lyonya Shilovsky, has captivated the internet after actor Madhavan shared a video of his astonishing performance. Lyonya, who began drumming at one, confidently led a full orchestra, showcasing remarkable musicality and stage presence without sheet music. His talent, first recognized on a Russian talent show, continues to amaze viewers worldwide, proving exceptional abilities can emerge at a very young age.

articles.title: Suriya, Hombale Film Actress Kayadu Lohar Reveals She 'Broke' Boy's Head After Facing Eve Teasing
articles.description: Kayadu Lohar shot to fame with Ashwath Marimuthu, Pradeep Ranganathan's Dragon. She was last seen in Tovin Thomas' Pallichattambi.

articles.title: Amber Heard Dated Cara Delevingne After Johnny Depp Divorce, Model Confirms
articles.description: Cara Delevingne has confirmed she dated Amber Heard after the actor's divorce from Johnny Depp, addressing years of speculation. The model also reflected on Depp's reported jealousy and her close bond with Heard.

articles.title: Welcome To The Jungle: 'Akshay Kumar's Energy Is Unbelievable,' Says Ucha Lamba Kad Forever Composer Anand - EXCL
articles.description: Ucha Lamba Kad was revamped as Ucha Lamba Kad Forever in Welcome to the Jungle. While discussing it with Zoom, composer Anand Raaj Anand said the song was 'only slightly remixed'.

articles.title: Tarot card reading for June 30: Wisdom grows when you remain open to learning, zodiacs
articles.description: Tarot Card Reading Horoscope Today For June 30: Step into the mystical realm as the tarot cards reveal what the universe has in store for you today. Whether you`re seeking clarity in love, career, or personal growth, today`s tarot insights offer powerful guidance tailored to your zodiac sign.

articles.title: Want to raise a topper? 8 parenting habits that work better than long study hours
articles.description: Toppers are often seen as kids who stay glued to their study desks or have nothing else but tuition classes as part of their routine. But in reality, parents who raise high-achieving children rarely make their children do so. What sets them apart is the foundation.A child who genuinely loves to learn isn’t raised through constant pressure, in fact, it’s about simple yet consistent efforts that help them achieve better scores than the kids around them. Here are eight simple parenting habits that can make all the difference:

articles.title: 'Welcome To The Jungle' box office collection Day 4: Akshay Kumar starrer enters Rs 100 crore club worldwide despite expected Monday slowdown
articles.description: Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome To The Jungle' experienced a significant dip on its first Monday, earning an estimated Rs 8.50 crore. Despite this, the comedy has crossed the Rs 100 crore global mark within four days, reaching Rs 106.48 crore. The film's domestic net collection stands at Rs 72.25 crore. Analysts anticipate a strong first-week total, with potential to surpass Rs 150 crore if momentum is maintained against upcoming releases.

articles.title: Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki's real-life breakup's impact on 'The Big Bang Theory': 'They handled it beautifully, but...'
articles.description: The filming of 'The Big Bang Theory' presented a significant emotional challenge for Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki as their real-life breakup coincided with their characters' on-screen separation. Director Anthony Rich reflected on the charged atmosphere of season three, especially during the 'Spaghetti Catalyst' episode. Cuoco's emotional struggle surfaced at times, yet the duo maintained remarkable professionalism, showcasing their strong friendship and resilience in navigating both personal and professional challenges.

articles.title: Elle review: Legally Blonde prequel is bright, breezy and just a little too safe
articles.description: Forced to leave Beverly Hills for Seattle, teenager Elle Woods navigates new friendships, first love and school politics while staying true to herself.

articles.title: Centre Unveils Two Major Reforms To Boost Indian Film Industry, Expand Cinema Screens - Details
articles.description: The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting has introduced two significant initiatives to enhance the Indian film industry and increase cinema screens nationwide.

articles.title: Lewis Hamilton reportedly facing unexpected pressure over his looks after Kim Kardashian romance goes public
articles.description: Lewis Hamilton is reportedly facing greater pressure over his appearance since going public with Kim Kardashian. Insiders claim the Formula 1 star has explored wellness and cosmetic treatments, including hair restoration options, though no major procedures are planned during the racing season. Friends say the couple shares similar ambitions and has a natural connection, while Hamilton has publicly praised Kardashian's unwavering support as their relationship continues to attract widespread attention.

articles.title: "I’m working hard": Brittany Mahomes says watching Patrick Mahomes inspired one emotional promise she made to their kids
articles.description: Brittany Mahomes says becoming a mother has made her more ambitious and intentional about pursuing her goals. She hopes her children, Sterling, Bronze, and Golden, see both her and Patrick Mahomes working hard and following their dreams. Brittany believes leading by example will teach them that success comes through determination and perseverance. She also shared that her daughter Sterling has shown growing interest in her work, making those moments even more meaningful.

articles.title: “There’s so much drama and explanations": Blake Lively reportedly gets another chance as Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding rumors intensify
articles.description: Rumors suggest Taylor Swift may be open to repairing her friendship with Blake Lively ahead of her reported July 3 wedding to Travis Kelce. Their relationship was reportedly strained after Swift's name surfaced in Blake Lively's legal dispute with Justin Baldoni over It Ends With Us. New reports claim Swift has extended an olive branch with a possible wedding invitation, though insiders say rebuilding trust will take time and nothing has been officially confirmed.

articles.title: Taylor-Travis's wedding prep begins at Madison Square Garden - PICS
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly set for a highly private wedding this weekend, with extensive security measures in place. Invitations feature unique watermarks to prevent leaks, and the venue, possibly Madison Square Garden, remains undisclosed on the invites. Cargo trucks have been spotted at the venue, fueling speculation for a July 3rd celebration.

articles.title: DWTS alums Maksim Chmerkovskiy and Peta Murgatroyd leave Los Angeles for Florida, list family home for $18K a month
articles.description: Dancing With the Stars alums Maksim Chmerkovskiy and Peta Murgatroyd have traded Los Angeles for Boca Raton, Florida, embarking on a new family chapter with their three sons. The emotional move, documented online, has brought them happiness and a slower pace of life. Their former Valley Village home is now available for rent at $18,000 per month.

articles.title: Sonakshi and Zaheer enjoy family dinner with Shatrughan Sinha
articles.description: Sonakshi Sinha and Zaheer Iqbal were recently spotted enjoying a family dinner in Mumbai, accompanied by Sonakshi's parents, veteran actor Shatrughan Sinha and Poonam Sinha, along with Zaheer's father, Iqbal Ratansi. The family's warm outing caught the attention of paparazzi, with one heartfelt moment particularly winning over fans.

articles.title: Who is Kathy Leutner? All about Sidney Crosby's girlfriend of over a decade as wedding rumors swirl ahead of new season
articles.description: Sidney Crosby, the Pittsburgh Penguins’ captain and star player, has always been a force to be reckoned with on the ice, over the last decade. While the 38 year old has remained committed to his career for a decade, he has always been pretty private about his personal life. It has been long known that he is in a committed relationship with Kathy Leutner even though she prefers to stay out of the spotlight.

articles.title: Gaurav Khanna's Desire For Children Is Reason Behind Separation, Reveals Wife Akanksha Chamola On Lock Upp
articles.description: Akanksha Chamola revealed on Lock Upp 2 that her differing views on parenthood led to her separation from Gaurav Khanna. While Gaurav wanted children, Akanksha chose to remain child-free and does not even wish to adopt.

articles.title: Prince Harry Looking At "Every Available Option" To Bring Archie, Lilibet To UK: Report
articles.description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle are currently vacationing in Europe with their kids.

articles.title: Microdramas Are Making Billions, But Writers Say The Pay Is Shocking
articles.description: While the format of microdrama is growing in popularity, not everyone is benefiting equally.

articles.title: Brazil vs Japan, FIFA World Cup Round of 32: Selecao survive scare with last-gasp winner - Action in images
articles.description: Brazil vs Japan, FIFA World Cup Round of 32: Selecao beat Samurai Blue 2-1 to reach Round of 16

articles.title: “I decided to leave”: Alex Pereira explains Tracy Cortez breakup, fresh interview brings new attention to their short lived romance
articles.description: Alex Pereira has spoken publicly about his brief relationship with Tracy Cortez in a recent interview shared by ChampRDS. He said the split was mutual and wished her well. The clip has reopened conversations about their short romance, while fans continue to debate what led to the breakup based on public comments and online speculation.

articles.title: Legacy studios bet on mobile-first entertainment for next growth phase
articles.description: India's established media giants like Yash Raj Films, Zee Entertainment, and Saregama are strategically investing in digital-first platforms and creator-led businesses. This move aims to capture the growing mobile-first audience by developing new intellectual property in micro-dramas and vertical content. These investments signal a significant shift towards embracing emerging entertainment formats to ensure future growth and relevance in the evolving media landscape.

articles.title: Centre Announces Big Reforms to Boost Cinema, Expand Theatres
articles.description: The Ministry of Information and Broadcasting has initiated several measures to bolster the Indian film industry, including forming a high-level study group led by Prasoon Joshi.

articles.title: Children’s theatre festival opens with lively performances by young cast
articles.description: Children’s theatre festival opens with lively performances by young cast

articles.title: Are Cardi B and Stefon Diggs separated again? Her BET Awards speech hinted at it
articles.description: Cardi B's BET Awards win for Best Female Hip Hop Artist saw her deliver a heartfelt speech dedicated to her children and faith, notably omitting any mention of her on-again, off-again NFL boyfriend, Stefon Diggs. This silence comes amid their tumultuous relationship, marked by recent public appearances and a resurfaced argument, making her focused acceptance speech a significant statement for fans.

articles.title: Mumbai doctors save infant with rare lipid disorder after heart scare
articles.description: Mumbai’s Wadia Hospital saved a 2.5-month-old with rare LPLD after triglycerides hit 42,000 mg/dL, using IV nutrition and a low-fat feed plan.

articles.title: Welcome To The Jungle Box Office Collection Day Day 4: Akshay Kumar Film Passes The Monday Test, Earns Rs 8.5 Crore
articles.description: Welcome To The Jungle passed the crucial Monday test by earning Rs 8.5 crore on Day 4. The Akshay Kumar-led comedy has collected Rs 72.25 crore in India, including paid previews.

articles.title: A Few Good Men: Kevin Pollak on Reiner's advice & Nicholson's pranks
articles.description: Kevin Pollak recalls filming 'A Few Good Men,' sharing director Rob Reiner's advice to 'have fun' on set and a story of how Jack Nicholson playfully tried to distract Tom Cruise during the famous 'I want the truth' courtroom scene.

articles.title: Biopic 'Tenzing' to explore legendary Everest ascent with Hiddleston
articles.description: Apple TV announces 'Tenzing', a biographical drama on Sherpa Tenzing Norgay's historic Everest ascent. Genden Phuntsok stars as Norgay alongside Tom Hiddleston as Edmund Hillary. The film, directed by Jennifer Peedom, also features Willem Dafoe.

articles.title: Taylor Swift And Travis Kelce’s Secret Wedding Plans Spark Bold New Fan Theories
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce is set to tie the knot during the Fourth of July weekend.

articles.title: Ab Hoga Hisaab Season 2 trailer out: Shaheer Sheikh and Sanjay Kapoor return for a more intense showdown
articles.description: Amazon MX Player releases Ab Hoga Hisaab Season 2 trailer, promising intensified conflict, betrayals and Bobby’s dangerous search for Bunty.

articles.title: James Norton to star as Hamlet in new London West End production
articles.description: James Norton is set to play Hamlet in a new London West End production directed by acclaimed German director Thomas Ostermeier. The revival of Shakespeare's tragedy is scheduled to open in the fall of 2027, marking Ostermeier's English debut.

articles.title: Welcome To The Jungle: Shraddha Kapoor enjoys movie night with Rahul Mody as they watch Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty’s film
articles.description: A casual night out turned into a talking point after Shraddha Kapoor and Rahul Mody were spotted enjoying a Akshay Kumar's multi-starrer film together in Mumbai.

articles.title: Alpha: Alia Bhatt-Sharvari Film Rated UA 16+ By CBFC; Runtime, Plot Summary Revealed
articles.description: Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, has been cleared by the CBFC with a UA 16+ certificate. Also featuring Bobby Deol and Anil Kapoor, Alpha is set to arrive in theatres on July 3.

articles.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashma: Bawari catches Bagha red-handed with another girl
articles.description: Bawari catches Bagha with another girl, unaware it is Tapu in disguise, setting up an emotional and hilarious confrontation tonight.

articles.title: Content creators Harsh Anil Rana and Devendra Anil Rana now set for OTT debut after building massive followers?, Details inside
articles.description: Content creators Harsh and Devendra Rana overcame financial struggles, built millions of followers and are now preparing for their OTT debut.

articles.title: Nothing wrong in appointment of ‘Jana Nayagan’ film producer Venkata Narayana: Thirumavalavan
articles.description: Thirumavalavan defends Venkata Narayana's appointment, emphasizing its lack of impact and advocating for transparency in governance.

articles.title: BAFTA-Winning Actress Dame Penelope Keith Dies At 86
articles.description: Dame Penelope Keith famously played snobbish suburban neighbour Margo Leadbetter in The Good Life.

articles.title: Why The Title Of Shraddha Kapoor's Eetha Has Sparked A Major Debate
articles.description: Shraddha Kapoor's upcoming film Eetha has landed in controversy after the NCP and the family of Lavani legend Vithabai Narayangaonkar demanded a title change. While the teaser has generated excitement, critics argue that a biopic inspired by Vithabai's life should carry her name. The debate has reignited discussions around artistic freedom, legacy and whether films based on iconic personalities should directly honor them through their titles.
